title: Part 5 – Entraînement 3 : vocabulaire & structure de phrase
instructions: Choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui complète correctement chaque phrase.

items.sentence: The candidate demonstrated ____ knowledge of financial reporting standards during the interview.
We would like to ____ our sincere apologies for the delay in processing your order.
items.explanation: Expression figée : "extend our apologies" = présenter nos excuses.

items.sentence: The proposal was ____ rejected by the committee without further discussion.
The new regulation will ____ how companies report their environmental impact.
items.explanation: "affect" est un verbe (influencer) ; "effect" est un nom.

items.sentence: Participation in the survey is entirely ____ and results are anonymous.
The company has ____ measures to reduce its carbon footprint by forty percent.
items.explanation: "implement measures" = mettre en place des mesures.

items.sentence: Please ____ that all documents are signed before submitting the application.
items.explanation: "ensure that" = s'assurer que (chose). "Assure" s'utilise avec une personne.

items.sentence: The board has decided to ____ the merger pending further legal review.
items.explanation: "postpone" = reporter, différer. Contexte : attente d'un avis juridique.

items.sentence: The new software is ____ compatible with all operating systems used in the organisation.
Management is committed to providing a safe and ____ work environment for all employees.
items.explanation: Adjectif coordonné avec "safe" : "safe and inclusive work environment".
